summary: Completed testing of ENERGY Surcharge Customer-Level Pattern feature. All backend tests pass (7/7). Frontend shows ENERGY surcharge in Suggested Additions panel with 'seen in 80% of orders', Add All adds all 6 suggestions including ENERGY, Order Total correctly includes ENERGY ($15,065.79 = $14,568.43 + $497.36).

issues: React hydration warnings in console (div in p, span in tbody, tr in span) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React hydration warnings due to nested HTML elements (div in p, span in tbody) - should be fixed for cleaner console output but doesn't affect functionality
seed_data_creation: POST /api/sales-dashboard/demo/run-batch seeds batch-child documents with C-9874 items AND customer-level ENERGY surcharge pattern (trigger_item='*')
context_for_next_testing_agent: ENERGY Surcharge Customer-Level Pattern feature fully tested. Backend preflight endpoint at /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight/{doc_id} returns ENERGY surcharge as a suggested line with trigger_item='*', fixed_qty=1, unit_price=497.36, pattern_frequency=0.8 (80%). Frontend review page at /review/{doc_id} shows ENERGY in Suggested Additions panel. After clicking Add All, ENERGY line appears in editable table with Qty=1 and Price=$497.36. Order Total correctly includes ENERGY surcharge. The price field is editable. Customer-level pattern (trigger_item='*') is stored in order_line_patterns collection.
